layout.description: High-density CSS Grid container implementing the Topological Layout. Manages global hotkeys (Ctrl+K, Esc) and the 'Read-Only Contract' badge.
Polymorphic navigation rail using implicit Context state. Supports standard navigation and 'Action Triggers' (e.g., Chaos Mode).

hud_and_navigation.description: Top-level HUD. Displays 'Vectors Loaded', 'Unindexed Friction', and 'Active JAX Version'. Includes the Global Search Input.
The primary router for expert operators. Handles fuzzy search, axiom filtering (/axiom2), and deep linking.

monitor_engine.description: Sovereign Data Handler. Manages WebSocket/SSE connections. Decouples physics logic from rendering.
SVG/WebGL renderer for Hamiltonian Norm and Rho Max. Uses physics-based spring interpolation (Stiffness: 170) for organic motion.
Unified overlay manager. Aggregates GhostTracer, Schematic Toasts, and Runtime Warnings into a single Z-index layer.

remedial_manifold.description: Consolidated explorer replacing separate file/friction trees. Uses 'Lens' toggles (Friction, Filesystem, Telemetry) to filter data.
The 'Right Pane' action space. Orchestrates code comparison (DiffViewer) and KEL fix application.
Visualizer for fix reliability. Displays similarity scores, historical recurrence, and resolution rates.

temporal_axiomatic.description: Horizontal timeline tracking scan events (Start, Anomaly, Fix). Provides temporal context to spatial findings.
Real-time validator for system rules (e.g., 'Sanitization', 'Intent Consistency'). Shows satisfied/violated states.

telescope_system.description: Deep-dive modal using Render Props to inject 'AI Analysis' or 'Raw Code' views dynamically.

hooks_and_utils.role: Manages SSE connection and implements 'Pause/Scrub' buffer logic.
Fetches and aggregates KEL stats for the HUD.
Auto-generated file containing strictly typed SVG paths.
